name: Dinosaur Burger
recipeIngredient: 9 Inch loaf of unsliced Sour-dough bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread horizontally in half using a large, serrated knife. Remove the soft bread from the top half and set it aside. Crumble enough bread to measure 1 cup and reserve the top crust.
2. Preheat the broiler.
3. In a large bowl, combine bread crumbs, dry soup mix, and water. Let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the beef lightly.
5. Shape into a 9 inch patty and place on the broiler rack over a pan.
6. Broil 6 inches from the heat until firm, about 10 minutes.
7. Line the bottom half of the bread with lettuce leaves.
8. Lift the beef patty onto the lettuce using two pancake turners.
9. Top with tomato slices, pickle chips, and place the top crust on.
10. To serve, cut the burger into wedges. Serves 6 to 8.
